name: Boa Hancock
subtypes: The Seven Warlords of the Sea
effect_text: [Blocker] (After your opponent declares an attack, you may rest this card to make it the new target of the attack.)[On Play] Look at 3 cards from the top of your deck and place them at the top or bottom of your deck in any order. Then, give up to 1 rested DON!! card to 1 of your "The Seven Warlords of the Sea" type Leader or Character cards.
